title: lentilla lens
intro: Lentilla lens, also known as the Lenticula or Lens culinaris, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the pea family. The medicinal properties of lentilla lens come from its seeds, which have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming lentilla lens include lowering cholesterol levels, regulating blood sugar levels, and reducing the risk of heart disease and certain types of cancer. Lentilla lens seeds can be prepared into herbal teas, soups, or powders, and are also used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and as a dietary supplement.
